creator: onemda@gmail.com
text:
diff -Nur liboil.old/Makefile liboil/Makefile
--- liboil.old/Makefile 2009-01-06 18:37:41.000000000 +0000
+++ liboil/Makefile     2009-04-08 08:40:04.000000000 +0000
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
 #      $Id: Makefile 23 2006-10-25 14:24:32Z buhnux $
 
 PORTNAME=      liboil
-PORTVERSION=   0.3.15
+PORTVERSION=   0.3.16
 CATEGORIES=    devel
 MASTER_SITES=  http://liboil.freedesktop.org/download/
 
diff -Nur liboil.old/distinfo liboil/distinfo
--- liboil.old/distinfo 2008-07-26 03:30:26.000000000 +0000
+++ liboil/distinfo     2009-04-08 08:41:18.000000000 +0000
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (liboil-0.3.15.tar.gz) = 11dd39b1ca13ce2e0618d4df8303f137
-SHA256 (liboil-0.3.15.tar.gz) = ae5e3b03a72dd4d12accbe7a6022e4e8570fa309defec9846341384d0a657fd4
-SIZE (liboil-0.3.15.tar.gz) = 822195
+MD5 (liboil-0.3.16.tar.gz) = febb1d9f9bc4c440fcf622dc90f8b6b7
+SHA256 (liboil-0.3.16.tar.gz) = 009115b0fc888dfe28903fecfe806707c544ccad6554ebabdeb3a1d88ec1e9d1
+SIZE (liboil-0.3.16.tar.gz) = 855765
